title: hieracium bifidum subsp. soerdalense
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. soerdalense, also known as Soerdal's hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion-like hawkweed family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Hieracium bifidum subsp. soerdalense can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
